'''hadhaza''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:miargyrite|miargyrite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-dh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:miargyrite|miargyrite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| hadhaza
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hædhæzæth|hædhæzæth]] || [[word:hædhæzæj|hædhæzæj]] || [[word:hædhæzæsh|hædhæzæsh]] || [[word:hædhæzæ|hædhæzæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hadhadhazath|hadhadhazath]] || [[word:hadhadhazaj|hadhadhazaj]] || [[word:hadhadhazash|hadhadhazash]] || [[word:hadhadhaza|hadhadhaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hadhazath|hadhazath]] || [[word:hadhazaj|hadhazaj]] || [[word:hadhazash|hadhazash]] || [[word:hadhaza|hadhaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hadhafzafth|hadhafzafth]] || [[word:hadhafzafj|hadhafzafj]] || [[word:hadhafzafsh|hadhafzafsh]] || [[word:hadhafzaf|hadhafzaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hadhazatha|hadhazatha]] || [[word:hadhazaja|hadhazaja]] || [[word:hadhazasha|hadhazasha]] || [[word:hadhazaka|hadhazaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hadhazath|hadhazath]] || [[word:hadhazaj|hadhazaj]] || [[word:hadhazash|hadhazash]] || [[word:hadhaza|hadhaza]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hadhazathal|hadhazathal]] || [[word:hadhazajal|hadhazajal]] || [[word:hadhazashal|hadhazashal]] || [[word:hadhazakal|hadhazakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hadhazaathatha|hadhazaathatha]] || [[word:hadhazaajaja|hadhazaajaja]] || [[word:hadhazaashasha|hadhazaashasha]] || [[word:hadhazaaka|hadhazaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hadhazathan|hadhazathan]] || [[word:hadhazajan|hadhazajan]] || [[word:hadhazashan|hadhazashan]] || [[word:hadhazakan|hadhazakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hadhazathaoro|hadhazathaoro]] || [[word:hadhazajaoro|hadhazajaoro]] || [[word:hadhazashaoro|hadhazashaoro]] || [[word:hadhazakaoro|hadhazakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1da9d54}}
